name: Danger! Zone
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>未</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>み</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>界</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>かい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>域</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>いき</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>危</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>き</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>険</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>けん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>地</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ち</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>帯</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>たい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
name_jp_tl: Danger Zone of the Lands Unknown
desc: Draw 3 cards, then discard 2 cards including at least 1 "Danger!" card, or, if you have no "Danger!" cards in your hand, show your entire hand and shuffle it into the Deck. You can only activate 1 "Danger! Zone" per turn.
eff: Draw 3 cards, then discard 2 cards including at least 1 "Danger!" card, or, if you have no "Danger!" cards in your hand, show your entire hand and shuffle it into the Deck. You can only activate 1 "Danger! Zone" per turn.

action: Returns from your hand to your Deck
